prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L N74B68 V12 twin-turbo (632 PS stock) – forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, custom 4.0-inch V-band downpipes, and a bespoke Akrapovič 304 stainless steel exhaust system featuring quad 4.5-inch outlets and electronically controlled bypass valves for backpressure optimization

Drivetrain: ZF 8HP90 8-speed automatic transmission recalibrated with a Motec M150 ECU for shift logic optimization, paired with a Quaife ATB helical LSD and a custom carbon-fiber driveshaft to reduce rotational mass by 18%

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), featuring bespoke spring rates (800 lb/in front, 750 lb/in rear) and spherical bearing top mounts for precise alignment, integrated with a KW Automotive hydraulic lift system for curb clearance
estetica: Aerodynamics: Mansory Carbonado aero package, including a full carbon-fiber front splitter with integrated air curtains, side skirts with vortex generators, and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via a switch in the cabin), all finished in a custom 'Zenith Black' satin weave

Wheels: Forged 24-inch Rotiform LAS-R wheels in a staggered fitment (285/30 front, 325/25 rear) with a custom 'Phantom Silver' brushed finish, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires (285/30 ZR24 front, 325/25 ZR24 rear) for track-focused grip

Interior: Bespoke Stitch & Hide full leather retrim in 'Deep Navy' with contrast 'Crimson' stitching, featuring a custom Alcantara headliner, carbon-fiber trim with 'Zenith Edition' laser-etched badging, and a rear compartment upgrade with a Bang & Olufsen Beosound Stage sound system (24 speakers, 2,400W) and a retractable 20-inch Samsung The Frame QLED display
